Molecular Mechanism: Competitive antagonism of mosquito odorant-binding proteins (OBPs); masks host L-lactic acid and CO2
Clinical End-Result: Complete spatial vector repulsion; 0% wash-off or rub-off vulnerability
IRB Endpoint Tracking: Mosquito landing/feeding counts via cage assays

Molecular Mechanism: Systemic inhibition of Nuclear Factor Kappa B translocation to the nucleus
Clinical End-Result: Suppression of pro-inflammatory cytokines (IL-1β, IL-6, IL-8, TNF-α)
IRB Endpoint Tracking: Reduction in localized erythema and induration diameter

Molecular Mechanism: Upregulation of cytoprotective enzymes and intracellular glutathione synthesis
Clinical End-Result: Scavenging of reactive oxygen species (ROS); mitigation of oxidative DNA damage
IRB Endpoint Tracking: Biomarker assays tracking reduced lipid peroxidation in tissue samples

Molecular Mechanism: Upregulation of Caspase-3 Cleavage; down-regulation of anti-apoptotic BCL2 expression
Clinical End-Result: Direct induction of programmed cell death in abnormal hyperplastic cell lineages
IRB Endpoint Tracking: Histological clearance of hyperplastic cells at the bite site

Molecular Mechanism: Inhibition of protein prenylation and down-regulation of vimentin/COX-2 pathways
Clinical End-Result: Suppression of tumor vascularization and mechanical cellular migration pathways
IRB Endpoint Tracking: Micro-vascular density reduction via skin biopsy analysis

Molecular Mechanism: Direct plant-extract virucidal or schizonticidal activity within host erythrocytes/endothelial cells
Clinical End-Result: Interruption of pathogen replication cycles (preventing liver-to-blood progression)
IRB Endpoint Tracking: Polymerase Chain Reaction (PCR) viral/parasitic load clearance rates
